data.body: Locked the dso->rebar code-review adoption roadmap via one-at-a-time clarification, then created + decomposed epic sure-foyer-aroma (ac1b-cef3-35c8-415f). Key intent decisions (all validated against rebar's architecture to avoid inheriting dso antipatterns): DROP verbatim-excerpt/threshold-invariance/fragility-naming (compensating mechanisms rebar solves via Pass-2 verify + agentic grounding); RELOCATE absence-claim rigor to Pass-2; ADOPT positive linter-deference framing (backed by an in-repo experiment: positive framing gave recall 2.0->2.33 substantive with fewer nits, and DISPROVED the pink-elephant priming fear); ui_artifacts reclassified to a deterministic conflict-marker detector; deletion/asymmetric-change became a content-triggered deletion-impact LLM overlay (grounding oracle has no reverse-reference lookup, so a pure DET version is imprecise new work); tests overlay carries BOTH halves of the behavioral-testing standard (domain rubric stays in the overlay, Pass-2 stays generic) and this principle propagates to all 5 enriched overlays; scope-intent overlay checks the diff vs the UNION of all trailer-referenced tickets (extract_ticket_refs supports multiple ids) so multi-ticket commits don't FP; cross-patchset memory (#6) DEFERRED to its own epic super-path-bag (374d). Structure: 8 stories (A eval-foundation gates B-H; D has 6 overlay tasks with tests-first) + 6 tasks + 14 dependency/provenance links. Experiment harness at ~/.claude/jobs/19885ca3/tmp/nit_framing_exp.py.
